name: maX it PAWN
description_short: maX it PAWN is a pawn shop in Crystal, MN offering collateral-based loans, retail merchandise, gold buying, and flexible payment options including layaway.
description_long:
maX it PAWN operates as a pawn shop located at 5445 Lakeland Avenue North in Crystal, Minnesota, operating under the EZPAWN family of stores. The business provides traditional pawn lending services where customers can bring items of value and receive immediate cash loans secured by collateral. The store has been established as a community-focused pawn operation offering extended hours of service (10am-7pm weekdays, 10am-6pm Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday).

The company offers a comprehensive range of services including pawn loans, retail sales of pre-owned merchandise at 25-70% discounts off retail, gold and diamond jewelry buying, firearms sales, auto loans, and an online inventory browsing system. They feature an "Instant Quote" tool for electronics valuations, an EZ+ Rewards Program that provides points on eligible transactions, and specialized protection plans for jewelry and general merchandise. Payment flexibility is emphasized through layaway options (10% down with monthly payments) and third-party financing partnerships allowing customers to take items home and pay over extended periods (up to 12 months depending on credit eligibility).

maX it PAWN distinguishes itself through daily inventory updates, brand-name merchandise selection (Samsung, Apple, etc.), expert precious metals testing and valuation, and specialized loyalty programming. The store positions itself as "committed to working with you to get the quick cash you need with the service and respect you deserve" and emphasizes being a "proud member of the community." Their online shop extends reach beyond physical location browsing.

As a pawn operation, this business serves customers needing immediate cash against collateral but comes with inherent limitations: pawn loans require surrendering physical items, loan amounts are conservative relative to item value, and customers must retrieve items before loan expiration or forfeit collateral. The company's reliance on merchandise inventory and collateral-based lending means it serves a specific niche distinct from traditional credit products, with success dependent on customer item valuation accuracy and reasonable redemption timelines.
pros: Fast cash availability with items in decent working condition—no credit check required
Expert gold and diamond jewelry testing and valuation to ensure fair pricing
Wide selection of brand-name pre-owned merchandise (Samsung, Apple, etc.) at 25-70% discounts
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down) and third-party financing up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards Program provides points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions
Online Instant Quote tool for electronics valuations before visiting in person
Extended store hours (10am-7pm weekdays, 12pm-5pm Sunday) for convenient access
Product and jewelry-specific protection plans available for purchases
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical possession of items until loan is repaid
Loan amounts are typically conservative—'the more items are worth, the more we can lend' implies modest advance percentages relative to resale value
Customers risk permanent loss of collateral if loans are not redeemed before expiration
Not all services available in all areas (online payments specifically excluded in Arizona, Oregon, Pennsylvania)
Pawn transactions subject to unspecified 'terms and conditions, including fees' requiring in-person consultation
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable collateral (electronics, jewelry, tools, musical instruments) and can repay within pawn loan terms
Bargain hunters and budget-conscious shoppers seeking heavily discounted brand-name pre-owned merchandise
Individuals wanting to sell gold, diamond jewelry, or other precious metals without the hassle of online marketplaces
Customers seeking flexible payment options (layaway or financed purchases) for retail merchandise without credit approval
diagnosis: maX it PAWN is best for consumers who own valuable items they can temporarily surrender as collateral and need quick cash, or budget-conscious buyers seeking discounted pre-owned merchandise. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require physical collateral surrender with risk of permanent loss if not redeemed, and loan amounts are typically conservative percentages of item resale value, making this a short-term liquidity solution rather than an alternative to traditional credit.
services: Pawn loans—collateral-based cash advances on items in decent working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert precious metals testing
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts
Online Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Layaway payment option with 10% down and monthly installments
Third-party financing partnerships for items (up to 12 months depending on credit eligibility)
EZ+ Rewards Program with points accumulation on eligible transactions
Online shop with daily inventory updates and browsing
Jewelry Protection Plan (VIP) with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise coverage
